assertion_results.text: Sibling check correctly classifies TC-8001 as a different-stream companion (stream [rhtpa-2.2] vs current issue's [rhtpa-2.1]), not a same-stream duplicate (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md Step 4.1: 'Current issue TC-8006 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.1] (stream 2.1.x) / Sibling TC-8001 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.2] (stream 2.2.x) / Classification: Different-stream sibling (companion tracker). TC-8001 is NOT a same-stream duplicate.'

assertion_results.text: Step 4.2 checks the current issue's existing issuelinks before attempting to create a 'Related' link to TC-8001 (§1.58)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md Step 4.2: 'Reading TC-8006’s issuelinks array (fetched in Step 1): Link ID 1990401: type.name = "Related", direction = outward, outwardIssue.key = "TC-8001"'. Also confirmed in data-extraction.md which documents the existing link in the 'Existing Issue Links' table.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.2 detects the pre-existing 'Related' link to TC-8001 and skips link creation — does NOT call jira.create_link (§1.58)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md Step 4.2: 'Match found. ... Decision: Related link to TC-8001 already exists -- skipping link creation.' and explicitly states 'No jira.create_link call is made.'

assertion_results.text: The output includes a log message indicating the link was skipped because it already exists (e.g., 'Related link to TC-8001 already exists — skipping')
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md: 'Decision: Related link to TC-8001 already exists -- skipping link creation.' and triage-outcome.md: 'Related link to TC-8001 already exists -- skipping'

assertion_results.text: The sibling landscape table is still presented to the engineer despite the link already existing — the idempotent check only affects link creation, not the sibling summary
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md section '3. Sibling Landscape' contains a full table showing both TC-8001 (stream 2.2.x, In Progress) and TC-8006 (stream 2.1.x, New) with Affects Versions. The table is presented after the skip decision, confirming idempotent check only affects link creation.
